name: Settlement / Market
summary: The dusty surface settlement where Kael grows up. Scavenged, ochre, alive — the last clinging human community.

rooms.name: Market Square
rooms.lighting: Flat ochre daylight under a hazy sun, long dusty shadows.
rooms.sounds: Bartering voices, clatter of carts, a barking dog, wind-driven grit.
rooms.ambient: Crowded, wary, surviving — humanity hanging on.
rooms.furniture: Patched tarpaulin stalls, crates of salvage, a communal water cistern, strung wires.
rooms.map: Open square ringed by stalls; water cistern at center, main road entering from the south.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A post-apocalyptic settlement market square: patched tarpaulin stalls, crates of scavenged goods, a communal water cistern, strung wires and faded flags, dusty ochre daylight, ramshackle buildings beyond.

rooms.name: Kael's Shelter
rooms.lighting: Dim, slatted light through corrugated gaps; a small fire's glow.
rooms.sounds: Crackling fire, wind rattling metal sheeting, distant market hum.
rooms.ambient: Makeshift, resourceful, home to a street-smart kid.
rooms.furniture: A bedroll, a crate of tools and trophies, a small fire pit, hung scavenged gear.
rooms.map: Tight lean-to against a ruined wall; bedroll at back, fire pit near the entrance flap.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A makeshift shelter built into post-apocalyptic ruins: corrugated metal walls with slatted light, a bedroll, a small fire pit glowing, scavenged tools and gear hung on the walls, a young survivor's hideout.

rooms.name: Scavenger Stalls
rooms.lighting: Shadowed under awnings, shafts of dusty light between them.
rooms.sounds: Haggling, clink of traded parts, the creak of awning poles.
rooms.ambient: Transactional, cluttered, full of salvaged history.
rooms.furniture: Trestle tables of sorted scrap, hanging tools, weigh-scales, lock-boxes.
rooms.map: A row of covered stalls along a narrow lane; tables facing the walkway, storage behind.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A row of scavenger trading stalls in a post-apocalyptic market: trestle tables piled with sorted scrap and salvaged machine parts, hanging tools, weigh-scales, tattered awnings, shafts of dusty light.
